heading: Prohibition on Members of Congress making contracts with Federal Government
label: 6306 Prohibition on Members of Congress making contracts with Federal Government

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: A Member of Congress may not enter into or benefit from a contract or agreement or any part of a contract or agreement with the Federal Government.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to contracts that the Secretary of Agriculture may enter into with farmers.

children.label: A
children.text: the Agricultural Adjustment Act ( et seq.);7 U.S.C. 601

children.label: B
children.text: the Farm Credit Act of 1971 ( et seq.); or12 U.S.C. 2001

children.label: C
children.text: the Home Owners’ Loan Act ( et seq.).12 U.S.C. 1461

children.heading: .—Public record
children.label: 3 .—Public record
children.text: An exemption under this subsection shall be made a matter of public record.
